overview: Sora's defining strength is temporal coherence — it maintains consistent lighting, subject identity, and environment across longer durations than most video models. Practitioners report best results with prompts that describe a sequence or narrative arc rather than a single frozen moment. Camera language works cleanly. The community notes that explicitly asking for consistency ('the same subject throughout', 'consistent lighting') triggers better behavior than assuming it.

temporal_consistency.description: Sora's biggest differentiator — ask for it explicitly when it matters.

narrative_structure.description: Sora handles 'first X then Y' sequences better than most models. Use it.

camera_movement.description: Camera language works cleanly in Sora.

motion.description: Physical motion descriptions — how fast, what direction, what material.

lighting.description: Sora reads lighting well, especially named natural light conditions.

power_patterns: [Camera type]. [Subject + location]. [Narrative arc: begins with X, transitions to Y]. Consistent [subject/lighting/environment] throughout. [Lighting]. [Mood].
Opens on [establishing shot]. [Subject in motion, description]. Camera [moves], revealing [environment detail]. [Atmosphere].
antipatterns: Single frozen moment descriptions — Sora is better used when you describe movement and change over time.
Not specifying consistency — Sora CAN drift if you don't ask for consistency. Say it explicitly.
Too many scene changes — Sora can handle 2-3 transitions cleanly. More than that gets unstable.

strong: Slow dolly in. A lighthouse keeper stands at a window watching a storm approach across the sea. The same man, consistent lighting, throughout. Begins with wide shot of lighthouse exterior, wind bending coastal grass. Transitions to interior: his face, rain streaking the glass, a lantern flickering. Camera: steady, slow push toward the glass. Stormy grey light. Contemplative, isolated.

Opens wide on an empty train platform at dawn. A single figure sits on a bench. Consistent overcast morning light throughout. Camera slowly orbits the figure. The train approaches in the distance, growing. Environment stable. Documentary feel.
